items.title: Uber to open 2 campuses in India to support product development, operations
items.summary: Uber plans to open two new engineering campuses with a capacity of nearly 10,000 people in India by the end of 2027.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Dyson put a camera on its purifier so fresh air can follow you around the room
items.summary: Dyson has announced a new air purifying bladeless fan that's its first to incorporate an AI-powered camera for tracking the location of people in a room. Dyson already uses a mi...
